intentSynonyms: show me my instances in gcloud
see all my instances in gcloud
list compute engine vm instances in gcloud
description: List Compute Engine VM instances in a zone. If no zone is specified, lists instances across all zones using aggregated list.

project_id.description: Project ID (defaults to currently active project)

zone.description: Zone (e.g., "us-central1-a"). If omitted, lists across all zones.

page_token.description: Page token from a previous response
